Common.mockWarning: The current provider is mock-only and is for demos, not real LLM output.
Common.baselineWarning: This is an experimental baseline, not ProbeMate LLM output.

Shell.settingsDescription: Adjust appearance, language, and system shortcuts.

Home.heroEyebrow: A diagnostic gate for classroom short answers
Home.heroLead: Before the teacher says the next sentence, ProbeMate turns student evidence, lesson phase, and intervention risk into auditable Hold / Ask / Probe recommendations.
Home.valueSubtitle: ProbeMate does not replace teacher judgment. It makes the timing and strength of a follow-up question explicit, explainable, and reviewable.

values.evidenceBody: The LLM must quote student words, and quote audit blocks unsupported diagnosis.
values.commitmentBody: The gate adjusts Hold, Ask, or Probe based on introduction, practice, peer discussion, and wrap-up contexts.
values.researchBody: Every recommendation, teacher action, queue item, and condition material is written into episode logs for analysis.

Home.howSubtitle: A classroom demo only needs three steps.

how.oneBody: Generate a class code in Teacher view and project it for 1-2 sentence student answers.
how.twoBody: ProbeMate clusters answers, then the teacher selects one response for the gate.
how.threeBody: Review the next turn, evidence, risk notes, and record use, edit, delay, or skip.

Home.effectSubtitle: The point is not another page. It is a research hypothesis turned into an inspectable workflow.

effects.fast: Produce an actionable next question within 30 seconds
effects.safe: Reduce premature diagnosis and answer leakage risk
effects.export: Collect logs and CSV exports for Study 2/3/4
effects.compare: Generate No-AI, Standard LLM, Over-committed, Evidence-only, and ProbeMate conditions

Home.subtitle: A classroom diagnosis prototype before the teacher's next turn
Home.statusDescription: Check the active provider, real/mock mode, storage, and access mode.

links.teacherDescription: Create checkpoints, review answers, and run the diagnostic gate.
links.studyDescription: Generate five-condition materials, blind labels, rating templates, and exports.
links.researchDescription: Inspect episode logs, teacher actions, and CSV exports.
links.settingsDescription: Manage appearance, language, storage, and authentication status.

Settings.title: System Settings
Settings.description: Manage appearance, language preferences, storage, and authentication status.
Settings.themeDescription: Switch between light, dark, and system theme.
Settings.storageDescription: Current persistence mode and storage path.
Settings.storageHelp: Storage is configured by STORE_BACKEND and DATABASE_URL. Restart the API after changes.
Settings.authOpen: Local development mode, no login required
Settings.authHelp: Authentication is enabled with TEACHER_ACCESS_CODE and RESEARCH_ACCESS_CODE. Leave them empty for open local mode. Restart the API after changes.
Settings.aiDescription: Provider status, smoke test, mode switching, and demo data controls.
Settings.commandDescription: System dashboard for run counts and runtime status.
Settings.teacherDescription: Create checkpoints, manage answers, and run classroom diagnosis.

AISettings.title: AI Provider Settings
AISettings.description: This page shows runtime provider status and runs smoke tests. API keys stay in .env or startup scripts and are never stored in the browser.
AISettings.runtimeDescription: Confirm the app is not accidentally using mock output.
AISettings.providerIncomplete: The current provider is incomplete; real calls will use conservative fallback.
AISettings.smokeDescription: Call the current provider, then pass the result through quote audit and the diagnostic gate.
AISettings.question: Checkpoint question
AISettings.modeDescription: Separate demo data from research trial state.
AISettings.modeHelp: Mode appears in the global AppShell so classroom pilots, research materials, and demos stay distinguishable.
AISettings.demoHelp: Standard demo data uses paper-related episode names and excludes DevTools test titles.
AISettings.importedDemo: Imported demo data: {checkpoints} checkpoints / {responses} responses / {logs} logs

Teacher.title: Teacher checkpoints
Teacher.description: Create classroom entry points, open checkpoint workspaces, and handle representative answers.
Teacher.question: Classroom question

Checkpoint.entryDescription: Projection, collection status, and classroom context.
Checkpoint.teacherRepresentativeDescription: Quickly enter a typical answer observed in class.
Checkpoint.closedJoinError: Checkpoint is closed; no more answers can be added.
Checkpoint.joinFailed: Failed to add answer. Please try again.
Checkpoint.studentAnswersDescription: Select a representative answer before running the diagnostic gate.
Checkpoint.responseRecommendationHint: Rule-based clusters, prioritized by response count.
Checkpoint.waitAnswers: Waiting for student submissions, or enter a teacher representative answer on the left.
Checkpoint.noFilteredAnswers: No answers match the current filter.
Checkpoint.cacheHelp: Read/generate reuses cache first; rerun AI bypasses old cache; clear cache removes cards for this answer revision only.
Checkpoint.normalAnswerNotice: The selected response is not representative yet. Mark it representative before running the gate.
Checkpoint.cardDescription: Actionable Hold / Ask / Probe recommendations for the teacher.
Checkpoint.emptyCard: Select a representative answer and run analysis to see the next teacher move.
Checkpoint.teacherFeedbackPlaceholder: Record why you used it, how you edited it, or what public feedback students should hear.
Checkpoint.analysisNeedRep: Mark the current answer as representative before running the diagnostic gate.
Checkpoint.selectRepresentativeFirst: Select and mark one representative answer first.
Checkpoint.cacheEmpty: This answer has no cached cards to clear
Checkpoint.statusClosed: Checkpoint closed; students can no longer submit

Research.title: Research logs
Research.logDescription: Response source, evidence state, teacher actions, and gate audit fields.
Research.empty: No episode logs yet. Run representative-answer analysis to create research records.
Research.dataDictionaryDescription: Exported field definitions, sources, and allowed values.

StudyBuilder.title: Study Builder
StudyBuilder.description: Select an episode and generate No-AI, Standard LLM, Over-committed, Evidence-only, and ProbeMate materials.
StudyBuilder.chooseCondition: Select at least one experimental condition.
StudyBuilder.missingLog: This material has no episode_log_id and cannot be written back to the research log.
StudyBuilder.needNextTurn: Enter the teacher's next turn first.
StudyBuilder.previewEmptyBody: Choose an episode and conditions, then generate blinded Assistant A/B/C/D/E materials here.
StudyBuilder.previewEmptyStepOne: Select a real or imported episode
StudyBuilder.previewEmptyStepTwo: Keep the conditions you want to compare
StudyBuilder.previewEmptyStepThree: Download materials.csv and ratings.csv after generation
StudyBuilder.materialsDescription: For Study 2 expert rating and Study 3 teacher next-turn experiments.
StudyBuilder.selectEpisode: Select an episode to generate materials.
StudyBuilder.ratingDescription: ratings.csv includes expert-rating fields and four core judgment prompts.
StudyBuilder.ratingBestFit: Which output best fits the current classroom context?
StudyBuilder.ratingOver: Which output is most likely to diagnose too early or leak the answer?
StudyBuilder.ratingUnder: Which output is too weak and misses an appropriate diagnostic probe?
StudyBuilder.ratingSelfCorrection: Which output best preserves room for student self-correction?
StudyBuilder.nextTurnDescription: Record a timed teacher response and write it back to the episode log.

PhaseDemo.title: Phase manipulation
PhaseDemo.description: Same short answer: forward, because the car is still moving forward.
PhaseDemo.providerDescription: Run the same scenario with mock or the current environment provider.
PhaseDemo.contextDescription: Lesson phase and activity jointly shape intervention commitment.

Login.title: Access Login
Login.description: Use teacher or researcher access codes to protect backend pages in deployment.

Student.title: Student entry
Student.shortDescription: Short answers are only used to help the teacher choose the next question.
Student.closed: This checkpoint is closed. Return to the classroom discussion.
Student.noticeFallback: Your short answer helps the teacher choose the next question. The student view will not show misconception labels.
Student.closedError: This submission is closed. Return to class.

velocity_change.description: Mentions speed change or opposite direction
